---
Title: In Progress
---

This page is a temporary note to myself while this website remains under construction. 

Soon to be added:

- Personal Projects Tab with github links and attached READMEs / RPubs links
- Links to CSVs, README pages for lawrence projects
- Pictures of me doing personal interests (linked to the text)
- Certifications Tab (think Data Camp courses, Coursera, Online 1-off classes, etc)
- Education Tab (Masters, Bachelors, High School)
